sections.title: Exception pattern
sections.summary: Delayed staining can create a dim dead tail that visually invades the live boundary.

sections.title: Verification
sections.summary: Check whether the tail compresses after compensation review or prior QC normalization.

patterns.signal: A smooth dim tail extends from the dead population into the live shoulder.
patterns.interpretation: Likely staining-delay artifact rather than a second live population.
patterns.recommendedAction: Do not widen the live gate until compensation and prior approved runs are checked.
